Right now, we are expanding our hotel portfolio.
This month, I am working on a new partnership.
Andrea! It is so good to see you again. How are things at Escape Turismo?
Marco! Great to see you too. Things are busy, right now we are expanding our hotel portfolio in southern Europe.
That is exciting. I run a tour operator in Rome, and this season we are growing fast too.
Wonderful. Tell me, what does your company focus on these days?
We handle incoming tourism to Italy. At the moment, we are opening three new hotels in the south.
That is perfect timing. I manage our European itineraries, and I am always looking for strong local partners.
Then we should talk. I coordinate all our hotel deals, so I can be your direct contact.
I would love that. Let us set up a meeting and see how our teams can work together.
I am the Commercial Director, and I manage our commercial team.
I am responsible for our European itineraries.
Right now, we are expanding our hotel portfolio in Europe.
At the moment, I am working on a new partnership.
Part of my job is to liaise with hoteliers and suppliers.

Hi Andrea, it is Marco from Rome. It was great to see you again at the agency last month. I am calling with some news. At the moment, our company is growing fast, and we are opening three new hotels in the south of Italy this season. I know you manage the commercial team at Escape Turismo and that you handle the European itineraries, so I think there is a real opportunity here. Right now, we are looking for a strong partner for our incoming tourism, and you are the first person I thought of. Please give me a call this week, and we can talk about how our teams could work together. Take care, and talk soon.

Good afternoon, team, and thank you for joining this short briefing. I want to give you a quick picture of where we are right now. Our travel agency is having a very busy season. At the moment, we are expanding our hotel portfolio in southern Europe, and we are also launching a new outbound travel program for corporate clients. As you know, our commercial team usually works with partners in about ten countries, but this year we are adding four more. Please remember that each of you is responsible for one region, so keep your notes up to date. We are meeting the new suppliers next week, and I am counting on all of you to make a great impression.
